case_title: DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL VS. HUGO ALEXANDER MEJIA RIVERA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-30-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-17-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT.
